niches.title: Niches / Industries
niches.description: List of industries to search for agencies (e.g. healthcare, real-estate, saas).

location.title: Location Filter (optional)
location.description: Filter agencies by location slug as used on Clutch.co (e.g. 'new-york-city', 'london').

maxLeadsPerNiche.title: Max Leads Per Niche
maxLeadsPerNiche.description: Maximum number of agencies to extract per niche.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Apify proxy recommended to access Google SERPs.
